name: Mote
description: Bright motes paired with a faint shadow twin for depth, re-tinting on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 22%; top: 22%; @size: 50%; border-radius: 50%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); opacity: 0.3; -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 40%; top: 40%; @size: 34%; border-radius: 50%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
